name: Ranch Flavored Oyster Crackers Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 package Hidden Valley Ranch Mix (buy or make your own ranch mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the vegetable oil, Hidden Valley Ranch Mix, lemon pepper seasoning, garlic powder, onion powder, and dried dill.
3. Add the mixed nuts and fish crackers to the bowl with the oil mixture.
4. Pour the cracker mixture into a large baking pan.
5. Drizzle any remaining oil mixture over the crackers and nuts.
6. Stir gently to coat all ingredients evenly.
7. Bake for 15 minutes, ensuring they do not overbake.
8. Allow to cool before storing in an air-tight container.
